name: Grid/List View Toggle
uri: N/A — embedded button in DocumentGrid.jsx controls toolbar; not a routed page
notes: onClick fires handleViewToggle() which calls setState with a functional updater toggling state.viewMode between 'grid' and 'list'; no API call is made.
The button's visual state is driven by viewMode: active style (dark background, white text) when viewMode === 'grid'; inactive style (white background, dark border) when viewMode === 'list'.
Button label switches between '⊞' (grid mode → click to go list) and '☰' (list mode → click to go grid) — the icon shows the *current* layout, not the destination.

viewMode also controls the document container layout: CSS grid (auto-fill, minmax 280px) in 'grid' mode vs flex column in 'list' mode, and switches the per-document renderer between renderCard() and renderListRow().
